topic_card.topic_statement: New from the Anthropic Economic Index: how people’s use of Claude changes with experience. Longer-term users are more likely to iterate carefully with Claude, and less likely to hand it full autonomy. They attempt higher-value tasks, and receive more successful responses.
topic_card.why_now: Clustered 2 recent signals across 1 source families with verifiable anchors.

primary_sources.title: New on the Anthropic Engineering Blog: How we use a multi-agent harness to push Claude further in frontend design and long-running autonomous software engineering. Read more: https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/harness-design-long-running-apps

New from the Anthropic Economic Index: how people’s use of Claude changes with experience. Longer-term users are more likely to iterate carefully with Claude, and less likely to hand it full autonomy. They attempt higher-value tasks, and receive more successful responses.

supporting_sources.title: Claude Code 和 CodeX 远程连接到飞书 IM 的插件 Claude-to-IM-Skills 更新了！ 将你的 Claude Code 和 CodeX 远程连接到微信！ 而且配置方式极其简单：它会自动打开一个网页，你扫码就行。
